title: Our Reputation - Green & Spiegel
content:
Home > About us > Our Reputation

## Our reputation has been earned over many years of providing excellent immigration ​services.
The vast majority of our clients come to us the old fashion way: word of mouth referral. Happy clients refer friends, family and colleagues to us.
Green and Spiegel has been recognized by all the leading law publications through client and peer review and has received many awards recognizing excellence. This year, Green and Spiegel Canada was, once again, selected by Chambers & Partners as a Band 1 Law Firm for immigration services in the Chambers 2025 Canada and Global 2024 Guides, selected by Who’s Who Legal for Canada Corporate Immigration, named as one of Canada’s Top 10 Immigration Boutique Law Firms by Canadian Lawyer Magazine, selected by Best Lawyers Canada for Immigration Law, selected by The Globe and Mail’s Report on Business as one of Canada’s Best Law Firms for 2024, and finally, Legal 500 Canada ranked Green and Spiegel as the leading business Immigration Law Firm in Canada.
- R.F | Global HR Head
